basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) Teaching Assistants Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website svnit.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Teaching Assistants Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc./ M. Phil /in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with good academic record, Ph.D. in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with good academic record with 1st class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc. (Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry)
qualification.details: 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc./ M. Phil /in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with a good academic record. Ph.D. in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with a good academic record and 1st class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc. (Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry).

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the SVNIT recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the SVNIT recruitment is Teaching Assistants. This is an ad-hoc position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Teaching Assistants?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Teaching Assistants announced by SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistants post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Teaching Assistants post ranges from Rs. 45000 to Rs. 60000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for Teaching Assistants?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a 1st Class or equivalent CGPA in M.Sc./M.Phil in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry, or a Ph.D. in the same fields with a good academic record.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Teaching Assistants post is scheduled for 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. A duly filled application form might also be required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is SVNIT located?
faq.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) is located in Surat, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Teaching Assistants?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Registration, Document Verification, and a Written Test/Interview.
